description:
'''Adult contemporary''' ('''AC''') is category of [[popular music]] catered to [[adult]] [[Demography|demographics]], including [[Record chart|record charts]] and [[Radio format|radio formats]] that are focused on such music.

The exact assemblage of adult contemporary music is influenced primarily by the popular music trends of a given era, and which trends and [[Music genre|genres]] appeal more heavily to youth and young adults. It was originally established as a continuation of the [[easy listening]] and [[soft rock]] sounds from the 1960s and 1970s, acting as a counterbalance for the [[hard rock]] of the era, and later [[Heavy metal music|heavy metal]] and [[hip-hop]]: it initially focused on songs with varying degrees of influence from easy listening, [[pop music|pop]], [[Soul music|soul]], [[rhythm and blues|R&B]], [[quiet storm]], and [[Rock music|rock]]. In the 1990s, adult contemporary began to accommodate a hotter sound more inclusive of contemporary pop, and developed sub-categories devoted towards specific genres. 

In [[radio broadcasting]], adult contemporary formats typically target the demographic of adults 25–44, as they are favored among advertisers. They are differentiated primarily by their playlists, with "hot AC" stations usually focusing on [[uptempo]] mainstream music (including [[dance-pop]], [[contemporary R&B]], as well as [[Pop rock|pop]], [[Alternative rock|alternative]], [[indie rock|indie]], and soft rock, while excluding more specialized types of hip-hop, hard rock, [[teen pop]], and [[electronic dance music]] that do not appeal as strongly to older audiences), "mainstream AC" having a balance between current music and established hits from past decades, and "soft AC" having a more conservative sound. AC stations may also feature pop hits from previous decades that are considered [[Nostalgia|nostalgic]] by the target audience. 

Other sub-categories of AC have also emerged, including [[rhythmic adult contemporary]] (which focuses particularly on [[dance music]]), [[urban adult contemporary]] (which focuses on R&B and soul music), and [[Christian adult contemporary]].
